context: Evaluates whether the solution correctly uses generateText from the Vercel AI SDK with the required maxSteps configuration and properly processes the [[IGNORE]] directive. This pattern is central to capybot's message handling loop.
capability_tested: AI Text Generation with Tool Calling

checklist.name: generateText call
checklist.description: The `generateText` function from the `ai` package is called with `model`, `system`, `messages`, and `tools` parameters.

checklist.name: maxSteps: 10
checklist.description: `maxSteps` is passed as `10` to `generateText`, enabling up to 10 rounds of tool execution.

checklist.name: [[IGNORE]] detection
checklist.description: The result text is checked for the substring `[[IGNORE]]` and `null` is returned when it is present.

checklist.name: Return text on success
checklist.description: When `[[IGNORE]]` is absent, the function returns `result.text` (the generated string) directly.

checklist.name: Async function
checklist.description: The function is declared async and properly awaits the `generateText` call.
